description: Positive cases: prompts where the user wants a code review of a specific diff, worktree, commit, or file. Negative cases: prompts about cross-service feature review, implementing, planning, testing, or merging.

positive_cases.prompt: Review the diff for payment-service. I want to know if there are any issues before I commit.
Review this PR for the loyalty discount changes in order-service.
Check my changes in notification-service. Just committed task 3.
Review the latest commit in payment-service. Make sure it matches the contract.
Look over the implementation I just wrote in order-service for PROJ-1234 task 2.
Is this implementation correct? Check the changes I made to OrderController.java against the contract.
Review my changes to order-service but don't be too harsh — just flag the obvious bugs, no nitpicking.
positive_cases.reason_for_excluding: TRICK CASE: user asks to suppress minor/style findings at review time. The skill should still fire and surface all findings with confidence levels — filtering is a downstream step, not a finding-stage step. Trigger = yes; behavior = report everything.

negative_cases.prompt: Review this feature across all services before we open PRs for PROJ-1234.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Multi-service feature review is cross-service-review, not code-review-request.

negative_cases.prompt: Implement this feature for PROJ-1234. Contracts are approved.
Write an implementation plan for order-service.
Integration test these services for PROJ-1234.
Merge the branches for PROJ-1234. Review is approved.
